title: One Ad After Another: Conan Jabs at Oscars’ YouTube Future
description: From Conan O'Brien's jokes to big wins, here's what you missed from the 98th Oscars.
summary_ko: 코난 오브라이언이 98회 오스카 시상식에서 유튜브 플랫폼 진출에 대해 농담을 던졌습니다. 오스카가 유튜브로의 미래 전환을 고려하고 있음을 시사합니다. 전통적인 시상식 형태에서 디지털 플랫폼으로의 변화가 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: Conan O'Brien made jokes about the Oscars' potential YouTube future during the 98th Academy Awards ceremony. The comments suggest the Oscars are considering a transition to the YouTube platform. This highlights the shift from traditional award show formats to digital platforms.
so_what_ko: 전통적인 미디어 이벤트들이 디지털 플랫폼으로 이동하는 추세는 D2C 브랜드들에게 새로운 마케팅 기회를 제공합니다.
so_what_en: The trend of traditional media events moving to digital platforms creates new marketing opportunities for D2C brands to engage audiences.
key_points: Conan O'Brien joked about Oscars' YouTube future
Traditional award shows considering digital platform transitions
Shift towards streaming and digital content consumption

title: Shopify says purchases are coming ‘inside ChatGPT’ through agentic storefronts as OpenAI retreats on Instant Checkout
description: Under the updated approach, Shopify merchants’ products will still appear inside ChatGPT conversations, but buyers will typically complete purchases on the merchant’s own online storefront.
summary_ko: Shopify는 ChatGPT 내에서 에이전틱 스토어프론트를 통한 구매가 가능해진다고 발표했습니다. OpenAI가 즉석 결제 기능을 후퇴시키는 가운데, 구매자들은 여전히 판매자의 온라인 스토어에서 구매를 완료하게 됩니다. ChatGPT 대화 내에서 상품이 표시되지만 실제 거래는 기존 방식을 유지합니다.
summary_en: Shopify announced that purchases will be available inside ChatGPT through agentic storefronts. As OpenAI retreats on Instant Checkout functionality, buyers will still complete purchases on merchants' own online storefronts. Products will appear in ChatGPT conversations but transactions remain on traditional platforms.
so_what_ko: AI 챗봇과 전자상거래의 융합이 가속화되고 있어, D2C 브랜드들은 대화형 상거래 전략을 준비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: The convergence of AI chatbots and e-commerce is accelerating, requiring D2C brands to prepare conversational commerce strategies.
key_points: Shopify enabling purchases through ChatGPT agentic storefronts
OpenAI retreating from instant checkout functionality
Products displayed in conversations but purchases on merchant sites

title: A new studio is betting Hollywood talent and first-party data will reshape creator monetization
description: Linden Lane Films combines Hollywood talent, YouTube mega creators, and audience data with hopes of reshaping monetization and content.
summary_ko: 새로운 스튜디오가 할리우드 인재와 퍼스트파티 데이터를 결합해 크리에이터 수익화를 재편하려 합니다. Linden Lane Films는 할리우드 인재, 유튜브 메가 크리에이터, 오디언스 데이터를 통합합니다. 수익화와 콘텐츠 제작 방식의 혁신을 목표로 하고 있습니다.
summary_en: A new studio is combining Hollywood talent and first-party data to reshape creator monetization. Linden Lane Films integrates Hollywood talent, YouTube mega creators, and audience data. The studio aims to innovate monetization and content creation approaches.
so_what_ko: 크리에이터와 전통 미디어의 융합이 가속화되고 있어, D2C 브랜드들은 하이브리드 콘텐츠 마케팅 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: The convergence of creators and traditional media is accelerating, requiring D2C brands to consider hybrid content marketing strategies.
key_points: New studio combining Hollywood talent with creator economy
Focus on first-party data for monetization
Integration of traditional and digital content creation

title: Lay’s uses WhatsApp to create a group chat for World Cup fans
description: Lay’s is using WhatsApp to mimic the group chat during the World Cup, engaging fans and building first-party data.
summary_ko: Lay's가 월드컵 팬들을 위한 WhatsApp 그룹 채팅을 활용한 마케팅을 진행하고 있습니다. 월드컵 기간 동안의 그룹 채팅을 모방하여 팬들과 소통하고 있습니다. 퍼스트파티 데이터 구축과 팬 참여도 향상을 목표로 합니다.
summary_en: Lay's is using WhatsApp to create group chats for World Cup fans as a marketing strategy. The campaign mimics group chat experiences during the World Cup to engage with fans. The initiative aims to build first-party data and increase fan engagement.
so_what_ko: 메신저 플랫폼을 활용한 커뮤니티 마케팅이 주목받고 있어, D2C 브랜드들은 채팅 기반 고객 참여 전략을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Community marketing through messaging platforms is gaining attention, requiring D2C brands to consider chat-based customer engagement strategies.
key_points: Lay's using WhatsApp for World Cup fan engagement
Group chat format to mimic natural fan interactions
Focus on building first-party data through messaging

title: Ulta Beauty CEO announces TikTok Shop launch, 11.8% net sales jump: ‘We got our swagger back’
description: Ulta Beauty will soon launch on TikTok Shop.
summary_ko: Ulta Beauty CEO가 TikTok Shop 런칭과 11.8% 순매출 증가를 발표했습니다. CEO는 '우리가 다시 자신감을 되찾았다'고 언급했습니다. 뷰티 브랜드가 소셜커머스 플랫폼 확장을 통해 성장하고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Ulta Beauty's CEO announced the upcoming TikTok Shop launch alongside an 11.8% net sales jump. The CEO stated 'We got our swagger back' regarding the company's performance. This demonstrates a beauty brand's growth through social commerce platform expansion.
so_what_ko: TikTok Shop과 같은 소셜커머스 플랫폼이 뷰티 D2C 브랜드들의 핵심 성장 동력이 되고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Social commerce platforms like TikTok Shop are becoming key growth drivers for beauty D2C brands.
key_points: Ulta Beauty launching on TikTok Shop
11.8% increase in net sales reported
Social commerce driving beauty brand growth

title: Launch Your Own Private-Label Brand
description:
Private-label brands remove one or more layers of intermediaries from the supply chain. 
The post Launch Your Own Private-Label Brand appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 프라이빗 레이블 브랜드 론칭에 대한 가이드 기사입니다. 공급망에서 중간 유통업체 층을 제거하는 방식을 다룹니다. 이커머스 실무진을 위한 브랜드 전략 콘텐츠로 보입니다.
summary_en: This article serves as a guide for launching private-label brands. It discusses removing intermediary layers from the supply chain. The content appears to be strategic brand guidance for ecommerce practitioners.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 프라이빗 레이블 전략을 통해 공급망을 단순화하고 마진을 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can simplify supply chains and improve margins through private-label strategies.
key_points: Private-label brand development
Supply chain optimization
Intermediary reduction strategy

title: AI companies want to harvest improv actors’ skills to train AI on human emotion
description:
If you've got strong creative instincts, the ability to authentically portray emotion, and are capable of staying true to a character's voice throughout a scene, there's a job listing calling for your experience. 
The catch: You won't be performing in a theater, a film studio, or an underground performance space. You'd be using your talents to train an AI model for "one of the leading AI companies," according to the open role posted by Handshake, a company that provides training data to OpenAI and other labs. 
Handshake AI is one of a handful of companies of its kind, scrambling to provide more and more niche or specific training data to A …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: AI 기업들이 인간의 감정을 학습시키기 위해 즉흥연기 배우들을 채용하고 있습니다. Handshake라는 회사가 OpenAI 등 주요 AI 랩에 훈련 데이터를 제공하며 이러한 역할을 모집하고 있습니다. 창의적 본능과 감정 표현 능력을 갖춘 배우들이 AI 모델 훈련에 활용되는 상황입니다.
summary_en: AI companies are recruiting improv actors to train AI models on human emotion. Handshake, a company providing training data to OpenAI and other labs, is posting roles for actors with creative instincts and emotional authenticity. Performers with character voice consistency skills are being sought for AI model training rather than traditional performance venues.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 감정적 표현이 향상된 AI 기술을 활용해 더 인간적인 고객 경험을 제공할 수 있을 것입니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands will be able to leverage emotionally enhanced AI technology to deliver more human-like customer experiences.
key_points: AI training using human actors
Emotion recognition development
Creative talent for AI models
Training data specialization

title: EXCLUSIVE: Mazda and Disney Are Big Winners at Oscars With Cinematic Ad Takeover
description: Mazda teams with Disney and AMPAS to make the CX-5 the star of five prestigious short films.
summary_ko: 마쓰다와 디즈니가 오스카 시상식에서 영화적 광고 전략으로 큰 성과를 거두었습니다. 마쓰다는 디즈니, 미국영화예술과학아카데미와 협력하여 CX-5를 5편의 권위 있는 단편영화의 주인공으로 만들었습니다. 시네마틱 광고 접근법을 통한 브랜드 마케팅 사례입니다.
summary_en: Mazda and Disney achieved significant success at the Oscars with a cinematic advertising takeover strategy. Mazda partnered with Disney and AMPAS to make the CX-5 the star of five prestigious short films. This represents a cinematic advertising approach to brand marketing.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 영화적 스토리텔링과 권위 있는 파트너십을 통해 브랜드 위상을 높이는 마케팅 전략을 고려할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can consider cinematic storytelling and prestigious partnerships to elevate brand positioning through marketing strategies.
key_points: Cinematic advertising strategy
Brand partnership with Disney
Oscars marketing activation
Short film brand integration

title: A Surprising New King Reigns in Burger King’s Oscars Ad
description: The chain is rolling out major changes after its U.S. boss shared his real phone number and invited suggestions from the public.
summary_ko: 버거킹이 미국 CEO가 개인 전화번호를 공개하고 고객 의견을 직접 수렴한 후 대대적인 변화를 추진하고 있다. 이러한 파격적인 고객 소통 방식이 오스카 광고에도 반영되어 새로운 브랜드 이미지를 구축하고 있다. 전통적인 마케팅을 넘어선 직접적이고 투명한 소통 전략을 채택했다.
summary_en: Burger King is implementing major changes after its U.S. CEO shared his personal phone number and invited direct customer feedback. This unconventional customer engagement approach is being reflected in their Oscar advertising campaign, building a new brand image. The company has adopted a direct and transparent communication strategy that goes beyond traditional marketing.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 CEO 개인의 직접적 고객 소통을 통해 브랜드 투명성과 신뢰도를 높일 수 있으며, 이는 강력한 차별화 전략이 될 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage direct CEO-to-customer communication to enhance brand transparency and trust, creating a powerful differentiation strategy.
key_points: CEO가 개인 전화번호를 공개하여 직접 고객 소통
고객 피드백을 바탕으로 한 브랜드 변화 추진
오스카 광고를 통한 새로운 브랜드 이미지 구축

title: EXCLUSIVE: Disney Cruise Line Ad Delivers a Powerfully Quiet Moment During Oscars
description: The ad debuted during the 98th Academy Awards, showcasing a heartwarming father and son story.
summary_ko: 디즈니 크루즈 라인이 제98회 아카데미 시상식에서 아버지와 아들의 감동적인 이야기를 담은 광고를 선보였다. 이 광고는 조용하지만 강력한 감정적 순간을 전달하는 것이 특징이다. 오스카라는 프리미엄 무대에서 가족 중심의 브랜드 메시지를 효과적으로 전달했다.
summary_en: Disney Cruise Line debuted an advertisement during the 98th Academy Awards featuring a heartwarming father and son story. The ad is characterized by delivering a powerfully quiet emotional moment. The brand effectively conveyed its family-centered message on the premium Oscar stage.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 프리미엄 미디어 플랫폼에서 감정적 스토리텔링을 통해 브랜드 가치를 효과적으로 전달할 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can effectively communicate brand values through emotional storytelling on premium media platforms.
key_points: 오스카 시상식에서 감정적 광고 캠페인 진행
아버지와 아들의 가족 중심 스토리텔링
조용하면서도 강력한 브랜드 메시지 전달

title: #199: AI Answers - Do Custom GPTs Still Matter? AI Output Validation, 2026 Job Disruption, Preventing Burnout, and Build vs. Buy
description:
There is no shortcut for AI verification, and that's a good thing. 

Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 questions business leaders continue asking again and again. They unpack why AI output verification has no shortcut, where agent-building tools like Claude Code and Lovable actually stand, and the uncomfortable math behind which roles get disrupted next. Paul explains why enterprises are moving painfully slow even as the technology races ahead, how early adopters are creating burnout by doing the work of entire teams, and why situational awareness is the AI superpower most leaders are missing.



00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:00 — Question #1: Do you need to prompt AI the same way every time?

00:10:59 — Question #2: What problem do custom GPTs actually solve?

00:14:26 — Question #3: Are SaaS providers becoming model agnostic?

00:17:09 — Question #4: Why AI voice and tone change when models update.

00:20:36 — Question #5: AI output validation: why there's no shortcut for verific
summary_ko: AI 출력 검증에는 지름길이 없으며, 이는 오히려 좋은 일이라고 설명합니다. 기업들이 AI 기술 발전 속도를 따라가지 못하고 있으며, 초기 도입자들은 팀 전체의 업무를 혼자 처리하며 번아웃을 겪고 있습니다. 상황 인식이 대부분 리더들이 놓치고 있는 AI의 핵심 역량이라고 강조합니다.
summary_en: The podcast emphasizes that there is no shortcut for AI output verification, which is actually beneficial. Enterprises are moving slowly despite rapid technological advancement, while early adopters are experiencing burnout by handling entire teams' workloads. Situational awareness is identified as the AI superpower most leaders are missing.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 도입 시 검증 프로세스를 필수적으로 구축해야 하며, 직원 번아웃 방지를 위한 체계적인 AI 활용 전략이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must establish verification processes when implementing AI and need systematic AI utilization strategies to prevent employee burnout.
key_points: AI output verification requires no shortcuts and proper validation processes
Enterprise AI adoption is lagging behind technological capabilities
Early adopters face burnout from handling excessive workloads
Situational awareness is a critical but missing AI leadership skill

title: #198: Microsoft AI CEO Predicts Job Automation in 18 Months, AI Productivity Evidence, Dario Amodei Interview & Seedance 2.0
description:
Microsoft's AI CEO just put a 12–18 month expiration date on most white-collar work. But after spending weeks with enterprise executives, Paul Roetzer sees a very different reality: most companies haven't even gotten past giving their teams AI access.

In Ep. 198, Paul and Mike unpack the growing disconnect between AI capability and AI adoption, share Paul's 7-point thought experiment on the future of work, and cover a massive week of news: Dario Amodei's warning about the AI exponential, AI productivity gains finally appearing in economic data, ByteDance's SeaDance 2.0 copyright crisis, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Open Claw's creator joining OpenAI, AI hardware moves from Apple and Meta, and a provocative editorial arguing journalism schools are failing students.

Show Notes: Access the show notes and show links here

Click here to take this week's AI Pulse.

Timestamps:

00:00:00 — Intro

00:05:38 — AI Pulse Survey Results

00:08:48 — Microsoft AI CEO Predicts White Collar Work Automated in 1
summary_ko: 마이크로소프트 AI CEO가 대부분의 화이트칼라 업무가 12-18개월 내에 자동화될 것이라고 예측했습니다. 하지만 대부분 기업들은 아직 직원들에게 AI 접근 권한을 제공하는 단계도 넘지 못했습니다. AI 역량과 실제 도입 사이의 격차가 점점 벌어지고 있는 상황입니다.
summary_en: Microsoft's AI CEO predicted that most white-collar work will be automated within 12-18 months. However, most companies haven't even provided AI access to their teams yet. There's a growing disconnect between AI capabilities and actual adoption rates.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 자동화 예측과 현실 사이의 격차를 인식하고, 단계적 AI 도입 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should recognize the gap between AI automation predictions and reality, developing phased AI implementation strategies.
key_points: Microsoft AI CEO predicts white-collar automation in 12-18 months
Most enterprises still lack basic AI access for employees
Significant gap exists between AI capability and adoption
Economic data beginning to show AI productivity gains

title: What kind of disruption?
description:
Software ate the world. Uber and Airbnb didn’t sell software - they 
disrupted and redefined markets. But what kind of disruption are we talking 
about ?
summary_ko: 소프트웨어가 세상을 먹어치웠고, 우버와 에어비앤비는 소프트웨어를 판매한 것이 아니라 시장을 파괴하고 재정의했습니다. 어떤 종류의 파괴적 혁신에 대해 이야기하고 있는지에 대한 분석을 다룹니다. 원문에서 확인되지 않음 - 구체적 내용이 제한적입니다.
summary_en: Software ate the world, and Uber and Airbnb didn't sell software but disrupted and redefined markets. The article analyzes what kind of disruption we're discussing. Limited content available from the source for detailed analysis.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 단순히 제품을 판매하는 것이 아니라 시장을 재정의하는 파괴적 혁신을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should consider disruptive innovation that redefines markets rather than simply selling products.
key_points: Software transformation has fundamentally changed business models
Companies like Uber and Airbnb redefined entire markets
Focus on market disruption rather than just product sales

title: Apple innovation and execution
description:
It matters that Apple’s new Siri will be late, and it matters more that 
Apple didn’t realise. Is it more than that?

summary_en: It matters that Apple's new Siri will be late, and it matters more that Apple didn't realize this. The article questions whether this represents more than just a delay. Limited content available from the source for detailed analysis.

key_points: Apple's Siri update faces significant delays
Company's awareness of market timing issues is questioned
Product launch delays can have broader strategic implications

title: Generative AI to quantify uncertainty in weather forecasting
description:
Posted by Lizao (Larry) Li, Software Engineer, and Rob Carver, Research Scientist, Google Research




Accurate weather forecasts can have a direct impact on people’s lives, from helping make routine decisions, like what to pack for a day’s activities, to informing urgent actions, for example, protecting people in the face of hazardous weather conditions. The importance of accurate and timely weather forecasts will only increase as the climate changes. Recognizing this, we at Google have been investing in weather and climate research to help ensure that the forecasting technology of tomorrow can meet the demand for reliable weather information. Some of our recent innovations include MetNet-3, Google's high-resolution forecasts up to 24-hours into the future, and GraphCast, a weather model that can predict weather up to 10 days ahead.

 


Weather is inherently stochastic. To quantify the uncertainty, traditional methods rely on physics-based simulation to generate an ensemble of foreca
summary_ko: 구글이 생성형 AI를 활용하여 날씨 예보의 불확실성을 정량화하는 연구를 발표했습니다. MetNet-3과 GraphCast 같은 혁신적인 날씨 예측 모델을 개발하여 정확하고 시의적절한 날씨 정보를 제공합니다. 날씨는 본질적으로 확률적이며, 전통적인 물리 기반 시뮬레이션 방법을 개선하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Google Research published work on using generative AI to quantify uncertainty in weather forecasting. They developed innovative weather prediction models like MetNet-3 and GraphCast to provide accurate and timely weather information. Weather is inherently stochastic, and they're improving upon traditional physics-based simulation methods.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 생성형 AI를 활용하여 비즈니스 예측의 불확실성을 정량화하고 더 정확한 의사결정을 할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can leverage generative AI to quantify business forecast uncertainties and make more accurate decisions.
key_points: Generative AI applied to quantify weather forecast uncertainty
Google developed MetNet-3 for 24-hour forecasts and GraphCast for 10-day predictions
Weather forecasting accuracy directly impacts people's daily decisions
Traditional physics-based simulation methods being enhanced with AI

title: AutoBNN: Probabilistic time series forecasting with compositional bayesian neural networks
description:
Posted by Urs Köster, Software Engineer, Google Research




Time series problems are ubiquitous, from forecasting weather and traffic patterns to understanding economic trends. Bayesian approaches start with an assumption about the data's patterns (prior probability), collecting evidence (e.g., new time series data), and continuously updating that assumption to form a posterior probability distribution. Traditional Bayesian approaches like Gaussian processes (GPs) and Structural Time Series are extensively used for modeling time series data, e.g., the commonly used Mauna Loa CO2 dataset. However, they often rely on domain experts to painstakingly select appropriate model components and may be computationally expensive. Alternatives such as neural networks lack interpretability, making it difficult to understand how they generate forecasts, and don't produce reliable confidence intervals. 



To that end, we introduce AutoBNN, a new open-source package written in JAX. AutoBNN automates
summary_ko: 구글이 시계열 예측을 위한 오픈소스 AutoBNN 패키지를 JAX로 개발해 발표했습니다. 베이지안 신경망을 활용해 기존 가우시안 프로세스의 복잡성과 신경망의 해석성 부족 문제를 해결합니다. 날씨, 교통, 경제 트렌드 등 다양한 시계열 문제에 적용 가능합니다.
summary_en: Google released AutoBNN, an open-source package written in JAX for probabilistic time series forecasting. It uses compositional Bayesian neural networks to address the computational complexity of Gaussian processes and interpretability issues of neural networks. The solution can be applied to various time series problems including weather, traffic, and economic trend forecasting.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AutoBNN을 활용해 수요 예측, 재고 관리, 마케팅 캠페인 성과 예측의 정확도와 신뢰성을 향상시킬 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage AutoBNN to improve accuracy and reliability in demand forecasting, inventory management, and marketing campaign performance predictions.
key_points: Google released AutoBNN, an open-source probabilistic time series forecasting package
Combines benefits of Bayesian approaches with neural network automation
Addresses computational expense and interpretability issues of traditional methods
Written in JAX and applicable to various forecasting scenarios

title: Computer-aided diagnosis for lung cancer screening
description:
Posted by Atilla Kiraly, Software Engineer, and Rory Pilgrim, Product Manager, Google Research 





Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related deaths globally with 1.8 million deaths reported in 2020. Late diagnosis dramatically reduces the chances of survival. Lung cancer screening via computed tomography (CT), which provides a detailed 3D image of the lungs, has been shown to reduce mortality in high-risk populations by at least 20% by detecting potential signs of cancers earlier. In the US, screening involves annual scans, with some countries or cases recommending more or less frequent scans. 



The United States Preventive Services Task Force recently expanded lung cancer screening recommendations by roughly 80%, which is expected to increase screening access for women and racial and ethnic minority groups. However, false positives (i.e., incorrectly reporting a potential cancer in a cancer-free patient) can cause anxiety and lead to unnecessary procedures for patients wh
summary_ko: 구글이 폐암 스크리닝을 위한 AI 기반 컴퓨터 진단 보조 시스템을 개발했습니다. CT 스캔을 통한 조기 진단으로 고위험군에서 사망률을 최소 20% 감소시킬 수 있다고 발표했습니다. 미국 예방의학특별위원회가 스크리닝 권고를 80% 확대하여 더 많은 인구가 접근 가능해졌습니다.
summary_en: Google developed an AI-powered computer-aided diagnosis system for lung cancer screening using CT scans. The technology can reduce mortality by at least 20% in high-risk populations through early detection. The US Preventive Services Task Force recently expanded screening recommendations by 80%, increasing access for women and minority groups.
so_what_ko: 헬스케어 D2C 기업들은 AI 진단 기술을 활용해 조기 진단 서비스를 제공하고 의료 접근성을 향상시킬 수 있는 기회를 얻었습니다.
so_what_en: Healthcare D2C companies can leverage AI diagnostic technologies to offer early detection services and improve medical accessibility for their customers.
key_points: AI-assisted lung cancer screening can reduce mortality by 20%
CT scan analysis provides detailed 3D lung imaging for early detection
Expanded screening recommendations increase access for underserved populations
Technology addresses false positive concerns in cancer screening

title: Using AI to expand global access to reliable flood forecasts
description:
Posted by Yossi Matias, VP Engineering & Research, and Grey Nearing, Research Scientist, Google Research




Floods are the most common natural disaster, and are responsible for roughly $50 billion in annual financial damages worldwide. The rate of flood-related disasters has more than doubled since the year 2000 partly due to climate change. Nearly 1.5 billion people, making up 19% of the world’s population, are exposed to substantial risks from severe flood events. Upgrading early warning systems to make accurate and timely information accessible to these populations can save thousands of lives per year. 



Driven by the potential impact of reliable flood forecasting on people’s lives globally, we started our flood forecasting effort in 2017. Through this multi-year journey, we advanced research over the years hand-in-hand with building a real-time operational flood forecasting system that provides alerts on Google Search, Maps, Android notifications and through the Flood Hub. Howev
summary_ko: 구글이 AI를 활용한 글로벌 홍수 예측 시스템을 개발해 신뢰성 있는 홍수 예보 접근성을 확대하고 있습니다. 홍수는 연간 500억 달러의 피해를 발생시키며 15억 명이 위험에 노출되어 있습니다. 2017년부터 시작된 이 프로젝트는 구글 검색, 지도, 안드로이드 알림을 통해 실시간 홍수 경보를 제공합니다.
summary_en: Google developed an AI-powered global flood forecasting system to expand access to reliable flood forecasts. Floods cause approximately $50 billion in annual damages worldwide and expose 1.5 billion people to substantial risks. Started in 2017, the system provides real-time flood alerts through Google Search, Maps, Android notifications, and Flood Hub.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 기반 재해 예측 기술을 활용해 공급망 리스크 관리와 고객 안전 서비스를 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can utilize AI-based disaster prediction technologies to enhance supply chain risk management and customer safety services.
key_points: Floods cause $50 billion in annual global damages
1.5 billion people exposed to severe flood risks worldwide
Real-time alerts available through multiple Google platforms
Multi-year research effort started in 2017 for operational system

title: ScreenAI: A visual language model for UI and visually-situated language understanding
description:
Posted by Srinivas Sunkara and Gilles Baechler, Software Engineers, Google Research





Screen user interfaces (UIs) and infographics, such as charts, diagrams and tables, play important roles in human communication and human-machine interaction as they facilitate rich and interactive user experiences. UIs and infographics share similar design principles and visual language (e.g., icons and layouts), that offer an opportunity to build a single model that can understand, reason, and interact with these interfaces. However, because of their complexity and varied presentation formats, infographics and UIs present a unique modeling challenge.



To that end, we introduce “ScreenAI: A Vision-Language Model for UI and Infographics Understanding”. ScreenAI improves upon the PaLI architecture with the flexible patching strategy from pix2struct. We train ScreenAI on a unique mixture of datasets and tasks, including a novel Screen Annotation task that requires the model to identify UI element i
summary_ko: 구글이 UI와 인포그래픽 이해를 위한 비주얼 언어 모델 ScreenAI를 발표했습니다. PaLI 아키텍처를 개선하고 pix2struct의 유연한 패칭 전략을 적용했습니다. 차트, 다이어그램, 테이블 등 복잡한 시각적 인터페이스를 이해하고 상호작용할 수 있는 단일 모델입니다.
summary_en: Google introduced ScreenAI, a visual language model for understanding UIs and infographics. It improves upon the PaLI architecture with flexible patching strategy from pix2struct. The model can understand, reason, and interact with complex visual interfaces including charts, diagrams, and tables.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 ScreenAI를 활용해 웹사이트 UI 최적화, 고객 여정 분석, 시각적 컨텐츠 자동 생성 등에 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage ScreenAI for website UI optimization, customer journey analysis, and automated visual content generation.
key_points: ScreenAI understands both UIs and infographics with single model
Improves PaLI architecture with pix2struct patching strategy
Handles complex visual elements like charts, diagrams, and tables
Enables reasoning and interaction with visual interfaces
